attempts.summary: Ran dns_tunneling skill script against Elasticsearch dns index from 2026-04-13 to 2026-04-20 with thresholds (min_total=500, min_fraction=0.6). No (src_ip, base_domain) pairs met tunneling criteria, so no internal hosts flagged.
